creator: brandon.wandersee@gmail.com
text:
Pandoc is under constant development, yet the version of Pandoc currently in the ports tree is nearly two years old and is quite a few releases (3 major, 16 minor) behind the current stable release. Hundreds of tweaks, fixes and features have been added in the meantime. I'd like to request that textproc/hs-pandoc be updated to the latest release (1.19.2.1).

As a side note, the last update to the textproc/hs-pandoc port added the optional dependency of TeXLive packages for the generation of PDFs. Newer releases of Pandoc are also able to use converters/wkhtmltopdf to generate PDFs from HTML5 and CSS3, so perhaps another option could be added to the `make config` menu to allow users to select either one of these dependencies, or possibly both if so desired.
